detectors.description:
Reentrancy in CurveStableSwapper.swap(address,address,uint256,uint256,address) (src/periphery/CurveStableSwapper.sol#172-211):
	External call allowing reentrancy:
	- exitPool1.exchange(exit1CrvusdIndex,exit1SusdeIndex,crvOut_scope_0,minOut) (src/periphery/CurveStableSwapper.sol#199)
	Balance read before the call:
	- outBefore = IERC20(tokenOut).balanceOf(address(this)) (src/periphery/CurveStableSwapper.sol#184)
	Possible stale balance used after the call in a condition:
	- require(bool,string)(amountOut >= minOut,SWAPPER: min out) (src/periphery/CurveStableSwapper.sol#207)
		- stale variable `amountOut`
